title: Developers' Society - Open House
content: An informal session for anyone curious about the Developers' Society. Current members will talk through past projects and answer questions about the selection process. Snacks provided.

title: Inter-hostel Football Finals
content: The final match of the inter-hostel football tournament. Blue Hostel takes on Red Hostel after both went undefeated through the group stage. Gates open at 4 PM.

title: Hackathon: Build for Campus
content: A 24-hour hackathon focused on building tools that solve real problems on campus. Teams of up to four. Prior programming experience helpful but not required - mentors will be around throughout.

title: Classical Music Evening
content: An evening of classical instrumental performances organized by the music club, featuring both student performers and an invited guest artist.

title: Career Talk: Life After Engineering
content: A panel discussion with alumni across different career paths - startups, research, and corporate roles. Open Q&A in the second half.

title: Photography Club - Golden Hour Walk
content: A casual walk around campus during golden hour for anyone interested in photography, beginner or experienced. Bring whatever camera you have, phone cameras welcome too.

title: Debate Society - Parliamentary Round
content: Open parliamentary-style debate round, open to spectators. This week's motion will be announced a day in advance on the club's noticeboard.
